LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BY JULY 31, 2007. IT APPEARS THAT SUNNYSIDE'S ACTIONS IN JANUARY 2006 CONSTITUTED A CONTRACT TERMINATION AND/OR A CAPACITY SALE REDUCTION WITHIN THE MEANING OF PARAGRAPHS D, D 1 (A) THROUGH (C), D 2 AND D 3. AS A CONSEQUENCE, P.G.& E.'S CLAIM FOR A REFUND ACCRUED AT THAT TIME. MR. MURPHY IS SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: LAURIE EDELSTEIN, ESQUIRE AND RANDALL KIM, ESQUIRE (BRUNE & RICHARD, 415.563.0600) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF P.G. & E. WILLIAM F. MURPHY, ESQUIRE AND WILLIAM WILSON, ESQUIRE (DILLINGHAM & MURPHY, 415.397.2700) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BY JULY 31, 2007. IT APPEARS THAT SUNNYSIDE'S ACTIONS IN JANUARY 2006 CONSTITUTED A CONTRACT TERMINATION AND/OR A CAPACITY SALE REDUCTION WITHIN THE MEANING OF PARAGRAPHS D, D 1 (a) THROUGH (c), D 2 AND D 3. AS A CONSEQUENCE, P.G.& E.'S CLAIM FOR A REFUND ACCRUED AT THAT TIME. MR. MURPHY IS SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
